div.span: Ticket Creation & Ticket Completion are grouped together in a single deployable entity because they are both front end facing and share the need for the same architectural characteristics of

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 314px; height: 1px; padding-top: 617px; margin-left: 748px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #7EA6E0;

text-align: justify
div.span: Ticket Assignment & Ticket Routing are grouped together in a single deployable entity because they are both back end processing components with tight semantic coupling i.e. all tickets assigned to an expert are routed immediately.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 314px; height: 1px; padding-top: 705px; margin-left: 385px;

text-align: justify
div.span: Ticket Lifecycle Management & Ticket Processing are separated to handle occasional spikes of Customer requests that can throttled while Experts are finishing up with tickets in the backlog.
